title: I'm This Clingy
about: I'm This Clingy is a redraw meme format based on a selfie photograph of a woman looking at her phone while a man's head is squeezed between her thighs, captioned, "Im this clingy😂." The photo without the caption originally started spreading online in 2018 and was popularized as a redraw meme in October 2025 after it was reposted by X / Twitter user @Mythicalblue_, with many of the redraws portraying popular ship pairings.
origin:
On June 19th, 2018, Tumblr[1] user nagask posted a selfie photograph of a man whose head is lying between a woman's thighs as the woman browses her phone, garnering over 9,100 notes in seven years. This is the earliest known user to post the image, although it is unclear if it is the true origin.

The image spread over the following years. For example, on September 30th, 2018, it was reposted by deactivated Tumblr[2] user s1nmiedo, gaining over 17,000 notes in seven years.

On October 1st, 2025, X[3] user @Mythicalblue_ posted a version of the meme with the added overlayed caption, "Im this clingy😂," garnering over 46,000 likes and 5,700 reposts in about two weeks.
